---
title: "Rāg Naṭ malhār"
subtitle: "*Mori nai lagana*"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

::: {.composer-info}
**Composer:** Niyāmat khān &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Tāl:** Ektāl (Madhyalay)
:::

## Lyrics {.unnumbered}

::: {.lyrics-block}

**Sthāyī**

> mori nai lagana lāgīre piyā tuma sana morā<br>sundara sneha lagī ghari pala china dina

**Antarā**

> jīyakī sakuca tyāji piyā so milana kī<br>ne kauna sirāta gāta bāra dai tana mana dhana

:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" collapse="true"}
## Reading the notation

Ektāl is a 12-beat cycle divided into six vibhāgs of two beats each (**2 + 2 + 2 + 2 + 2 + 2**). Each row below shows **one complete cycle**: the twelve columns correspond to beats 1–12. Following the manuscript, the vibhāgs are marked as **X** (sam, beat 1), **O** (khālī, beat 3), **X** (typically tali **2**, beat 5), **O** (khālī, beat 7), **3** (tali, beat 9), and **4** (tali, beat 11).

The sargam row gives the notes; the bold text row below it gives the lyrics syllables. A dash **-** indicates a held note or empty beat. Brackets $\lb{\cdot}$ denote meend (glide) or grouped notes; superscripts $\sps{\cdot}$ indicate the starting grace note of a glide; $\tr{X}$ denotes a note in the upper octave (tār saptak); $\mn{X}$ denotes a note in the lower octave (mandra saptak).
:::

## Sthāyī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .ektal}

| **X** |   | **O** |   | **X** |   | **O** |   | **3** |   | **4** |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| - | - | - | - | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{m}}\mathrm{D}}$ | P | m | G | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{R}}\mathrm{G}}$ | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{R}}\mathrm{S}\mathrm{S}}$ | $\mn{\mathrm{N}}$ | S |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **mo** | **ri** | **na** | **i** | **la** | **ga** | **-** | **na** |
| R | G | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{R}}\mathrm{G}}$ | m | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{m}}\mathrm{D}}$ | P | m | G | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{R}}\mathrm{G}}$ | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{R}}\mathrm{S}\mathrm{S}}$ | $\mn{\mathrm{N}}$ | S |
| **lā** | **gī** | **re** | **-** | **mo** | **ri** | **na** | **i** | **la** | **ga** | **-** | **na** |
| R | G | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{R}}\mathrm{G}}$ | m | $\lb{\mathrm{m}\mathrm{R}}$ | - | P | P | m | P | P | P |
| **lā** | **gī** | **re** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **pi** | **yā** | **-** | **-** | **tu** | **ma** |
| $\lb{\mathrm{m}\mathrm{P}\mathrm{D}\mathrm{N}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\mathrm{D}}$ | - | $\lb{\mathrm{n}-}$ | P | $\lb{\mathrm{m}\mathrm{P}\mathrm{D}\mathrm{D}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{P}\mathrm{m}\mathrm{P}-}$ | m | - | G | $\lb{\mathrm{m}\mathrm{G}}$ |
| **sa** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **na** | **mo** | **-** | **rā** | **-** | **-** | **-** |
| G | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{R}}\mathrm{G}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{G}\mathrm{R}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{S}\mn{\mathrm{N}}}$ | S | R | $\mn{\mathrm{N}}$ | S | R | G | m | P |
| **su** | **nda** | **ra** | **s** | **ne** | **ha** | **la** | **gī** | **gha** | **ri** | **pa** | **la** |
| $\lb{\mathrm{m}\mathrm{P}\mathrm{D}-}$ | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{m}}\mathrm{P}}$ | m | G | $\lb{\mathrm{m}-}$ | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{m}}\mathrm{D}\mathrm{P}}$ | m | G | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{R}}\mathrm{G}}$ | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{R}}\mathrm{S}\mathrm{S}}$ | $\mn{\mathrm{N}}$ | S |
| **chi** | **na** | **di** | **na** | **-** | **mori** | **na** | **i** | **la** | **ga** | **-** | **na** |

:::

## Antarā {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .ektal}

| **X** |   | **O** |   | **X** |   | **O** |   | **3** |   | **4** |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| - | - | G | m | P | P | P | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **-** | **-** | **jī** | **ya** | **kī** | **sa** | **ku** | **ca** | **-** | **-** | **ta** | **ji** |
| - | - | $\lb{\sps{\tr{\mathrm{S}}}\mathrm{N}}$ | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{N}\tr{\mathrm{S}}\tr{\mathrm{R}}-}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\mathrm{N}}$ | S | $\lb{\mathrm{S}-}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{D}\mathrm{n}}$ | P |
| **-** | **-** | **pi** | **yā** | **sa** | **mi** | **la** | **na** | **kī** | **-** | **-** | **-** |
| - | - | G | m | P | P | P | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **-** | **-** | **jī** | **ya** | **kī** | **sa** | **ku** | **ca** | **-** | **-** | **ta** | **ji** |
| - | - | $\lb{\sps{\tr{\mathrm{S}}}\mathrm{N}}$ | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{N}\tr{\mathrm{S}}\tr{\mathrm{R}}-}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\mathrm{N}}$ | S | $\lb{\mathrm{S}-}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{D}\mathrm{n}}$ | P |
| **-** | **-** | **pi** | **yā** | **so** | **mi** | **la** | **na** | **kī** | **-** | **-** | **-** |
| m | P | P | $\lb{\mathrm{m}\mathrm{P}\mathrm{D}\mathrm{N}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{N}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | D | P | - | $\lb{\mathrm{m}\mathrm{P}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{m}\mathrm{P}\mathrm{D}-}$ | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{P}}\mathrm{D}\mathrm{P}}$ |
| **ne** | **ka** | **u** | **na** | **-** | **-** | **si** | **rā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ta** |
| m | G | $\lb{\mathrm{m}\mathrm{R}}$ | - | G | m | P | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | D | P |
| **gā** | **-** | **ta** | **-** | **bā** | **ra** | **da** | **i** | **-** | **-** | **ta** | **na** |
| R | R | G | m | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - |
| **ma** | **na** | **dha** | **na** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |

:::
